value.body:
## Context

Cycle needs fast navigation across repositories, tickets, saved views, settings, and agent tasks.

## Outcome

A keyboard-first command palette lets users search tickets and run common navigation/actions from anywhere in the desktop workspace.

## Acceptance criteria

- Palette opens with a non-conflicting keyboard shortcut.
- Search includes ticket id, title, body excerpt, repository, status, labels, and assignee where available.
- Results route to tickets, repositories, saved views, inbox, settings, and agent tasks.
- Common commands include create ticket, open inbox, open settings, sync repository, and toggle sidebar.
- Search debounce, empty state, loading state, and error state are covered by tests.

frontmatter.title: Implement global ticket search and command palette

value.title: Implement global ticket search and command palette
